violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front and back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2026
Coving by restrooms and FRP lined shelf were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/05/2026

The side door to the outside, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024
The coving throughout the establishment was observed in poor repair. Physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024
